2026-06-29.content:
Support for deploying your existing apps in the flexible environment to Cloud Run using
the `gcloud beta app migrate-to-run` command is in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages). For more information, see [Deploy an App Engine app in the flexible environment to Cloud Run](https://docs.cloud.google.com/appengine/migration-center/run/migrate-app-engine-flexible-to-run).

summary.title: Migrate App Engine flexible to Cloud Run
summary.summary: You can now migrate your App Engine flexible environment applications to Cloud Run using the `gcloud beta app migrate-to-run` command. This feature is in Preview and allows for easier deployment of existing apps to Cloud Run. For detailed instructions, refer to the official documentation on migrating App Engine flexible to Cloud Run.

summary.title: Ruby 4.0 Runtime Now Generally Available
summary.summary: The Ruby 4.0 runtime is now in General Availability. This new runtime offers enhanced performance and features for your Ruby applications.

summary.title: Ruby 4.0 runtime now in preview
summary.summary: We're excited to announce that the Ruby 4.0 runtime is now available in preview. This new runtime offers enhanced features and performance improvements for your Ruby applications. You can start using it today to experience the latest advancements.

2025-08-07.content: To increase security, starting in March 2025, support for Transport Layer Security (TLS) version 1.1 and earlier is deprecated. [Update your application settings](https://cloud.google.com/appengine/docs/flexible/secure-minimum-tls) in the App Engine flexible environment to use TLS version 1.2 and later, along with a corresponding secure set of cipher suites (Preview).

summary.title: TLS Deprecation Update
summary.summary: Support for TLS 1.1 and earlier is deprecated starting March 2025. Update your application settings to use TLS 1.2 and later.

2025-06-17.content: Support for the [Ruby 3.4 runtime](https://cloud.google.com/appengine/docs/flexible/ruby/runtime) is in [General Availability (GA)](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages).

summary.title: Ruby 3.4 runtime now available
summary.summary: Ruby 3.4 runtime is now generally available for App Engine flexible environment.
